name: hcca-email-templates
description: 校園自治平台 email MJML 範本；templates/*.mjml 編譯為 compiled/*.html 供後端 renderer 讀取。

scripts.build: mjml --config.allowIncludes true templates/notification.mjml -o compiled/notification.html && mjml --config.allowIncludes true templates/generic.mjml -o compiled/generic.html
